name: Sorbetto Di Pesca Bianca (White Peach Sorbet)
recipeInstructions:
1. Wash the peaches and peel them.
2. Chop the peaches coarsely, removing the pits.
3. Put the peaches and sugar in a food processor; blend until liquified.
4. Add the freshly squeezed lemon juice and continue blending for a few seconds longer.
5. Transfer the mixture to an ice cream maker and freeze according to the manufacturer's instructions.
